assessments.status_rationale: Today’s items include a report about Amazon-USPS negotiations breaking down, but no evidence of Congress enacting (and the President signing) ≥$10B direct USPS support or raising USPS’s Treasury borrowing limit by ≥$10B.
No news in the provided bullets indicates Kalshi blocked/suspended event-contract trading for Arizona residents for ≥30 consecutive days due to the Arizona case, a court order, or a settlement.
No bulletin reports Mastercard announcing the closing/completion of an acquisition of BVNK or BVNK becoming a Mastercard subsidiary/unit.
Nothing in today’s bullets indicates OpenAI submitted a draft SEC registration statement for an IPO (confidentially or publicly), nor confirmation/reporting by two major outlets as specified.
No quarterly filing information is provided today regarding Nvidia’s China (incl. Hong Kong) revenue share reaching ≥20% in any quarter.
While oil prices are reported as jumping amid the Iran war, there is no cited EIA weekly retail on-highway diesel price release showing ≥$5.50/gal.

Multiple stories cover the Fed holding rates steady amid the Iran war and spiking oil, but the provided bullets do not include the exact FOMC statement/minutes/press-conference language needed to confirm the Fed explicitly labeled higher energy prices an 'upside risk' (or materially similar phrasing) to the inflation outlook.
No bulletin indicates any major U.S. airline announced a systemwide fare increase or fuel surcharge explicitly attributed to Middle East conflict risk and/or jet fuel price spikes.
No information is provided today about the Baltic Dirty Tanker Index (BDTI) closing at or above 2,500 on any trading day.

Nothing in today’s bullets indicates the Fed/FDIC/OCC issued formal guidance or a policy statement explicitly addressing permissible bank activities involving stablecoins or tokenized deposits with supervisory expectations.
